---
title: "campaign_updater.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/games/odin_protocol/engine/campaign_updater.py"
loc: 69
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.52
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 6.04
overall_score: 4.41
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating CampaignUpdater, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import CampaignUpdater and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [logging](file://logging)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic)

### Exports
- `CampaignUpdater`
- `__init__`
- `update_campaign`
- `_get_new_traces`
